authority: This file is the authoritative characterization, atom, and refactor-evidence description. Generated Markdown files are projections.

evidence_defaults.note: The canonical input landing selected no topology sidecars or images. Phase A review evidence is recorded separately under baseline.review_evidence.

design_axes.X: left/right; selected enclosure exterior spans approximately -95 to +95
design_axes.Y: front/rear; front exterior is near -95 and rear exterior near +115
design_axes.Z: bottom/top; selected enclosure exterior spans approximately -95 to +95

coordinate_contract.conflict: Repository-level legacy contract and params.py describe a 203 mm, 3/12/3 enclosure. Those values are not silently shared with this 190x210 family.

authorization: The user visually accepted the hash-bound Viewer artifact and said to proceed.
The user subsequently instructed the agent to continue through checkpoints and attempt the complete saved brief.
phase_b_pilot.module_boundary: native-CAD-free immutable metadata only: units, 190x210x190 envelope, axis polarity, center datum, and derived named planes
source_change: Made the single-oval Design consume width, depth, height, and center_y from that owner.
Replaced duplicated +10 mm Y-center expressions in existing 190x210 family consumers with Design.center_y.
Added AST/native-free regression tests and included them in the lightweight lint plan.
Did not change a Boolean, STEP, model identity, catalog entry, wall stack, seam, brace, fill path, assembly transform, or print contract.

before.failure: ValueError: rear-ramped longitudinal top rail did not produce one valid solid: 2

after.failure: ValueError: rear-ramped longitudinal top rail did not produce one valid solid: 2

native_boundary_comparison.interpretation: The metadata extraction introduced no earlier native failure and reached the exact frozen one-solid rail invariant. This is boundary-equivalence evidence, not geometry equivalence; no new STEP exists.

artifact_comparison.after_step_reason: The known owning-source rail failure still prevents export.

visual_comparison.before: User accepted the hash-bound near_perfect_bucket STEP in the read-only Viewer; Snapshot hashes remain recorded under baseline.review_evidence.
visual_comparison.after: No visual delta was generated because this atom is metadata-only and the owning geometry baseline still fails before STEP export.
visual_comparison.claim: The frozen reference is continuity evidence only. No old/new visual or geometric equivalence is claimed.

architectural_lessons: A pure datum owner can be extracted and tested without loading the CAD kernel.
The +10 mm Y center was a hidden family parameter, not a harmless placement literal.
Source-chain boundary comparison is useful for metadata atoms but cannot substitute for geometry equivalence.
The next geometry atom remains gated by repair of the deterministic top-rail failure.

construction_stages: single-oval-port base creates the monolithic shell, cavity, openings and early port geometry
header, serviceable-tower, absorber and rear-corner modules mutate the base through nested generate calls
conformal/printable/hooked/nested/centered/forward/dual/front-fill/simplified/single-land/systemic/lightweight modules replace functions and constants on imported ancestors
lightweight _lightweight_common_joint partitions full_base into nominal baffle and clearance-subtracted bucket, then adds lands, fills, supports and braces
simple-tongue-groove leaf temporarily replaces the perimeter wire and closure values, calls the entire ancestor chain, then restores globals
export and diagnostics occur only at the end of the deep mutation chain

output_validation_boundary.current_state: validator blocked because current lightweight source fails before publishing the authoritative base STEP

inventory_field_resolution: For each selected input, exact path/hash/catalog/role/freshness/contribution/conflict come from selected_inputs; sidecar/image/units defaults come from evidence_defaults; coordinate, parameter, construction, ancestry, output, validator, consumer and confidence fields come from the matching inventory_groups prefix.

R.parameter_ownership: 190x210 base parameters originate in single-oval-port; seam path and reset in simplified closure; bed/gasket/shoulder helpers in hooked closure; nested clearance in nested closure; bulkhead/braces and runtime closure patches in lightweight; hybrid perimeter in active leaf
R.units_datums_axes_transforms: mm; enclosure design coordinates X left/right, Y front/rear with front=-Y, Z bottom/top; accepted reference artifacts are already in assembly design coordinates with no additional transform
R.construction_and_boolean_stages: monolithic full_base; nominal/clearance envelope split; bucket subtraction and baffle intersection; service-opening cut; reset/land/bulkhead/fill/support unions and bore recuts; leaf perimeter mutation; STEP export
R.import_ancestry_hidden_mutation: full source_ancestry list; active leaf and lightweight temporarily replace functions/constants on imported ancestor modules and restore them after nested generate calls
R.outputs: catalog root build/sand_cube_190x210_internal_squat_absorber_rear_corners_parabolic_side_g1_simple_tongue_groove_baffle; immutable recovery and hybrid artifacts are separately hash-bound
R.validators: validate_simple_tongue_groove_baffle.py plus lightweight diagnostics; current validator is blocked by absent generated base
R.confidence_uncertainty: high for hashes, topology and measured artifact metrics; medium for documented candidate contributions; low for current-source equivalence and final lower seam/print footprint

I.parameter_ownership: historic references inherit the same distributed removable-closure sources; future integral parameters have no owner
I.units_datums_axes_transforms: mm; historic artifacts use the same enclosure assembly coordinates; future open-bottom print transform is intent only
I.construction_and_boolean_stages: historic artifacts are bucket/baffle partition plus gasket/hardware; semantic future branch point is full_base before the nominal/clearance split; integral front/open bottom/hatch booleans do not exist
I.import_ancestry_hidden_mutation: pre-split lightweight source still depends on the complete mutation chain; selected diagnostics mix lightweight/front-fill stage identity
I.outputs: only hash-bound historic full-perimeter bucket, baffle, assembly and diagnostics; no Variant I output root
I.validators: historic diagnostics only; no independent Variant I validator
I.confidence_uncertainty: high that selected artifacts are removable-front geometry; high that future I geometry is absent; low source/artifact freshness

tube.parameter_ownership: single-oval-port owns current bore/base values; header/serviceable/absorber/rear-corner stages own route composition
tube.units_datums_axes_transforms: mm; selected tube is positioned in enclosure design coordinates and contains six rigid solids
tube.construction_and_boolean_stages: base bore/duct, header, serviceable tower, internal absorber and rear-corner routing through nested source mutation
tube.import_ancestry_hidden_mutation: route source delegates through single-oval/header/serviceable/absorber ancestry; current source values differ from historic diagnostics
tube.outputs: hash-bound tube_reference.step and route_diagnostics.json; no Phase A regeneration
tube.validators: historic route diagnostics and geometric continuity assertions; no current enclosure-fit validation
tube.confidence_uncertainty: high artifact geometry metrics; medium historic 40 mm route semantics; low current source/artifact equivalence

resonator.parameter_ownership: Rev C model/duct/robust modules own mechanical study; Rev D generator owns its wider-slot/calibration differences
resonator.units_datums_axes_transforms: mm; Rev C placement is in enclosure coordinates; Rev D assembly is in local coordinates; Rev D print layout includes explicit separated part transforms
resonator.construction_and_boolean_stages: D-squat body/duct/cavity/slot construction, assembly composition and separate print-layout placement
resonator.import_ancestry_hidden_mutation: Rev D imports Rev C generator/model/duct rather than replacing them; the two revisions intentionally remain distinct
resonator.outputs: hash-bound Rev C placement STEP, Rev D assembly/layout STEP and Rev D diagnostics
resonator.validators: Rev C verify.py and Rev D diagnostics; neither replaces physical acoustic measurement
resonator.confidence_uncertainty: high artifact metrics and revision distinction; medium CAD acoustic prediction; physical target validation explicitly unknown

horn.parameter_ownership: params.py owns current legacy DE250/JMLC inputs; final_horn.py exposes API; features/horn.py owns recurrence/profile and exact revolved/thickened/NURBS construction
horn.units_datums_axes_transforms: mm and degrees; local horn construction revolves an XZ profile about Axis.Z with nonnegative radius; no selected STEP or enclosure transform
horn.construction_and_boolean_stages: JMLC meridian calculation, exact acoustic surface revolution, wall thickening and NURBS conversion; no enclosure integration
horn.import_ancestry_hidden_mutation: stable API calls feature builder; current default selects legacy recurrence while 2007 formula also exists
horn.outputs: formula/source references only in selected input set; no selected current STEP, sidecar or image
horn.validators: Onshape-safe health signs documented: one solid, no boundary/non-manifold edges, no interference and no OFFSET_SURFACE entities
horn.confidence_uncertainty: high formula/source provenance; low fit to 190 mm enclosure because current mouth is 222.463 mm

visual_review: Isometric Snapshot shows one coherent open-front bucket, a continuous sculpted perimeter seat, the top opening, retained internal rails/posts and no four repeated front corner hunks.
YZ center section shows the nested wall/shell outline and isolated internal ledges, but it is not sufficient to establish gasket compression, lower ownership or printable overhang angles.
No visual observation is used as proof of clearance, wall thickness, fit or source reproducibility.
